","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/typed/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/typed/README.md","text":"# typed > Type system engine for TiddlyWiki -- schema definitions via tiddler fields Define schemas via tiddler fields, validate instances, and create new typed tiddlers through a spawner UI. ## Key features * **Type definitions** -- define schemas with `rrt.type` and `rrt.fields` on tiddler fields * **Field definitions** -- validation rules, typed editors, calculated fields * **Validator** -- UI to check all instances against their type schemas (see Validator tab) * **Spawner** -- UI to create new typed tiddler instances (see Spawner tab) * **Field editor** -- type-aware input controls for editing typed fields * **Inheritance** -- parent types for shared field definitions * **Custom filters** -- `rrfunc` filter functions for type system queries ## Prerequisites No external prerequisites. ## Quick start Define a type tiddler with `rrt.type` and field definitions. Use the Spawner tab to create instances. Use the Validator tab to check for schema violations across all typed tiddlers. ## Plugin Library Install from the [rimir plugin library](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-plugin-library/) via *Control Panel → Plugins → Get more plugins*. ## Demo Try this plugin in the [live demo wiki](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-demo/). ## License MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md) ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/spawner":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/spawner","created":"20260209190206505","modified":"20260305110750637","stream-list":"","stream-type":"default","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\function _marker_new() __new \procedure _create_actions() <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<<_calculated>> $template=<> rrt.type=<>/> \end \function _calculate_state(type-key) [[$:/state/rimir/typed/example/__new:]addsuffix] \function _calculate_target-tid(type-key) [get[text]!is[blank]]~[function[_calculate_state],] <$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/typed/functions]]"> <$let type-field="rrt.type" state:type-selection="$:/state/rimir/typed/overview/selected-type" state:inst-selection="$:/state/rimir/typed/overview/selected-inst" > ''Type:'' <$select tiddler=<> default='HelloThere' actions="<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler=<>/>"> <$list filter='[function[_locate_rrt],[type]sort[title]]:filter[get[key]!prefix[_]]'> <$link to={{{[get[text]]}}}>=> type-def
<$let type-tid={{{[get[text]]}}} type-key={{{[get[key]]}}} > <$importvariables filter="[][get[parent]]:map[function[_locate-type-tiddler],]"> <%if [getmatchcount[]compare:integer:gt[0]]%> ''Instance:'' <$select tiddler=<> default=<<_marker_new>>> <$list filter='[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.typesort[title]]'>
<%endif%> <$let target-tid={{{[function[_calculate_target-tid],]}}} > <$link to=<>>=> target

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/TypeSystemOverview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/TypeSystemOverview","created":"20260208110008191","modified":"20260305110750638","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $variable="slider" label="Registered Types" src=""" <$transclude $variable="table-dynamic" filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[type]]" fields="tbl-clone tbl-nav caption key icon upref parent"/>"""/> <$transclude $variable="slider" label="Registered Enums" src=""" <$transclude $variable="table-dynamic" filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[enum]]" fields="tbl-clone tbl-nav caption key icon parent"/>"""/> <$transclude $variable="slider" label="Registered Fields" src="""<$transclude $variable="table-dynamic" filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[field]]" fields="tbl-clone tbl-nav caption key validity icon typed constraints"/>"""/>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/validator":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/validator","created":"20260305110750639","modified":"20260305110750639","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/typed/functions]]"> <$let type-field="rrt.type"> ! Typed Validator <$list filter="[function[_locate_rrt],[type]sort[key]]:filter[get[key]!prefix[_]]" variable="type-tid"> <$let type-key={{{[get[key]]}}}> <$importvariables filter="[][get[parent]]:map[function[_locate-type-tiddler],]"> !! <$text text={{{[get[icon]]}}}/> <$text text=<>/> (<$count filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type]"/>) <%if [all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.typefirst[]]%> <$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.typesort[title]]"> <$let target-tid=<>> <$list filter="[enlist]" variable="field-key"> <$let field-tid={{{[function[_locate-field-tiddler],,]}}}> <%if [function[_field-length-blocks],,]%> <%endif%> <%if [function[_field-length-warns],,]%> <%endif%> <%if [function[_field-unique-blocks],,]%> <%endif%> <%if [function[_field-unique-warns],,]%> <%endif%> <%if [get[typed]match[$title]]%> <%if [function[_calculated]!match]%> <%endif%> <%endif%> <%if [get[typed]match[$calculated]]%> <%if [function[_calculated]]:filter[get!match] +[first[]]%> <%endif%> <%endif%>

<%else%> //No instances// <%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/changelog","created":"20260305110750639","modified":"20260305110750639","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog |!Version |!Date |!Changes | |v0.1.4 |2026-03-15 |Replace inline style attributes with CSS classes, add styles.tid stylesheet | |v0.1.3 |2026-03-15 |Add name field to plugin.info | |v0.1.2 |2026-03-15 |Add regression tests and CI test gate | |v0.1.1 |2026-03-06 |Standardize plugin tabs, replace license.tid with LICENSE.md.meta sidecar, rename Validator/Spawner to lowercase | |v0.1.0 |2026 |Initial release | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/architecture","created":"20260305110750639","modified":"20260305110750639","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Schema model |!Schema element |!Discovery filter |!Key fields | |Type |`[rrt.type[type]]` |key, icon, parent, upref, `rrt.fields:0()` | |Field |`[rrt.type[field]]` |key, typed, constraints, validity | |Enum |`[rrt.type[enum]]` |key, parent, `rrt.options:0()` | !! Inheritance Single parent via `parent` field. Base type `_node` defines common fields + aggregator `rrt.fields()`. Subtypes add `rrt.fields:1()` and optionally `:2`. Same pattern for enums (`rrt.options:0`/`:1`/`:2`). !! Field resolution * Multiple field tiddlers can share the same `key` * `validity` field restricts a definition to specific types (most-specific wins) * `typed` controls the editor: `text`, `date`, `enum:`, type keys (object refs), `$title`, `$calculated` !! Constraints |!Constraint |!Meaning | |`n:1` |Single select | |`!N+` |Min N required (blocking) | |`N+` |Min N required (warning) | |`!u` |Unique wiki-wide (blocking) | |`u` |Unique wiki-wide (warning) | |`filter` |Title computation formula | !! Shared infrastructure * ''functions.tid'' — all shared functions: field lookup (`_locate_rrt`), validation, helpers * ''field-editor.tid'' — reusable per-field editor template (handles enum/text/date/object + validation) !! UI components * ''Spawner flow'': select type → `$importvariables` pulls functions + type + parent → `rrt.fields()` merges all levels → per field: locate definition, render editor (or `$title`/`$calculated` special handling) * ''Validator flow'': per non-abstract type → per instance: check min/unique/title/calculated constraints → red (blocking) or orange (warning) * ''Field Bar flow'': only for tiddlers with `rrt.type` field → per field: compact cell (icon + truncated value), click opens popup with `field-editor` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body">Uniqueness constraints (`!u`/`u`) are wiki-wide — they check all tiddlers, not just same-type instances. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260305110750640","modified":"20260305110750640","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin files |!File |!Role | |`functions.tid` |Shared function definitions | |`field-editor.tid` |Reusable per-field editor template | |`Spawner.tid` |Create/edit UI | |`viewtemplate-fields.tid` |Field Bar (ViewTemplate segment) | |`viewtemplate-styles.tid` |Field Bar CSS | |`Validator.tid` |Wiki-wide validation report | |`validator-styles.tid` |Validator CSS | |`TypeSystemOverview.tid` |Admin overview | |`modules/filters/rrfunc.js` |Safe function-call filter operator | !! Restart rules |!Change |!Restart needed? | |Edit Spawner/Validator/TypeSystemOverview |No — filesystem-watcher syncs | |Edit `rrfunc.js` |Yes — JS module | |Add/delete `.tid` files |Yes — directory scan at boot | |Add domain type/field/enum in another plugin |Yes — shadow tiddlers | !! Defining a type # Create `.tid` in domain plugin (e.g., `orga/typed/types/mytype.tid`) # Required fields: `key`, `rrt.type: type`, `title` # Optional: `parent` (inheritance), `icon`, `upref`, `caption` # Define `rrt.fields:1()` in body for extra fields # Restart server !! Defining a field # Create `.tid` with `key`, `rrt.type: field`, `typed` (editor type) # Optional: `constraints`, `validity` (type-specific override) # Add field key to parent type's `rrt.fields:1()` function # Restart server !! Type-specific field override Create a second field tiddler with same `key` + `validity: `. The `typed` value can differ (e.g., restrict parent references to specific types). !! Defining an enum # Base: create `.tid` with `key`, `rrt.type: enum`, define `rrt.options:0()` # Child: set `parent` field, add `rrt.options:1()` for additional options # Reference from field with `typed: enum:` # Restart server !! Known limitations * 3-level inheritance cap (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`) — TW issue #9647 prevents dynamic slot discovery * `$importvariables` is deprecated but necessary for dynamic type selection * No built-in `truncate` filter operator — Field Bar uses `splitregexp` + `first` + `join` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip"> <$fill $name="body">The typed plugin is the engine only. Domain-specific types, fields, and enums belong in separate plugins (e.g., the orga plugin). "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/examples","created":"20260305110750640","modified":"20260305110750640","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Define a type with fields Type tiddler (`typed/types/widget.tid`): ``` title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/types/widget rrt.type: type key: widget caption: Widget icon: ⚙️ parent: _node upref: w \function rrt.fields:1() color size ``` Field tiddler (`typed/fields/color.tid`): ``` title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/fields/color rrt.type: field key: color caption: Color typed: enum:colors constraints: !1+ ``` !! Type-specific field override Base field allows any parent: ``` title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/fields/parent rrt.type: field key: parent typed: _node constraints: !1+ ``` Override restricts widgets to only have `dashboard` parents: ``` title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/fields/widget_parent rrt.type: field key: parent typed: dashboard constraints: !1+ validity: widget ``` !! Define an enum Base enum: ``` title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/enums/colors rrt.type: enum key: colors caption: Colors \function rrt.options:0() red green blue ``` Extended enum (inherits parent options + adds more): ``` title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/enums/ext-colors rrt.type: enum key: colors parent: colors \function rrt.options:1() yellow purple ``` Result: the `colors` enum has options `red green blue yellow purple`. !! Spawner usage # Open the Spawner tiddler (`$:/plugins/rimir/typed/spawner`) # Select a type from the dropdown — fields load dynamically via `$importvariables` # Fill in the required fields (blocking constraints shown in red) # The title field auto-computes if the type defines a `$title` + `filter` constraint # Click "Create" — the new tiddler is created with all fields set !! Validator interpretation Open the Validator (`$:/plugins/rimir/typed/validator`). For each type: * ''Red entries'' (`!` prefix constraints): blocking — data must be fixed * ''Orange entries'' (no prefix): warnings — recommended but not required * Common checks: missing required fields (`!1+`), duplicate abbreviations (`!u`), invalid parent references "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/faq","created":"20260305110750640","modified":"20260305110750640","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Q: Why rrfunc instead of the native function[] operator? Native `function[]` leaks tiddler titles when the function is undefined — it returns the title of the tiddler being filtered instead of an empty result. `rrfunc` checks `isFunctionDefinition` first and returns `[]` if undefined. This is critical for inheritance where `rrt.fields:1` or `:2` may not exist on base types. !! Q: Why is there a 3-level inheritance limit? TW issue #9647 prevents dynamic iteration over function names (calling `rrt.fields:N` for variable N). The numbered slot pattern (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`) is hardcoded because there's no way to dynamically discover how many levels exist. !! Q: How do I add a new field editor type? Edit `field-editor.tid` and add an `<%if%>` branch for your new `typed` value. The editor template dispatches on the `typed` field of the field definition tiddler. Built-in types: `text`, `date`, `enum:`, type keys (object refs), `$title`, `$calculated`. !! Q: What's the difference between blocking and warning constraints? Blocking constraints (prefixed with `!`, e.g., `!1+`, `!u`) show red in the Validator and indicate data that must be fixed. Warning constraints (no prefix, e.g., `1+`, `u`) show orange and indicate recommendations. Both are checked wiki-wide by the Validator. !! Q: How does title generation work? When a field has `typed: $title` and `constraints: filter`, the constraint value is a TW filter expression. For example: `[get[parent]] [get[upref]] [get[abbrev]] +[join[]]` computes a title from parent, type prefix, and abbreviation fields. The Spawner evaluates this filter and sets the title automatically. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/overview","created":"20260305110750641","modified":"20260305110750641","rdt.hub-category":"ui-framework","rdt.hub-category-name":"UI Framework & Domain Model","rdt.hub-order":"3","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! What it does Type system engine for TiddlyWiki. Schema definitions (types, fields, enums) are tiddlers discovered by the `rrt.type` field. No central registry — any plugin can contribute type definitions. !! Features * ''Schema-as-tiddlers'' — types, fields, and enums defined via tiddler fields (`rrt.type`) * ''Discovery'' — `[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[type]]` finds all types automatically * ''Inheritance'' — single parent via `parent` field, 3-level slot system (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`) * ''Spawner'' — create/edit UI, renders editors per field type * ''Field Bar'' — compact inline bar in ViewTemplate, per-field popup editor + validation * ''Validator'' — wiki-wide constraint report (min counts, uniqueness, computed titles) * ''TypeSystemOverview'' — admin view of all types, fields, and enums * ''Custom operator'' — `rrfunc` safely calls functions (returns empty if undefined, unlike native `function[]`) !! Schema model * ''Type tiddlers'' (`rrt.type: type`) — entity kinds with key, icon, parent, title prefix * ''Field tiddlers'' (`rrt.type: field`) — properties with data types and constraints * ''Enum tiddlers'' (`rrt.type: enum`) — fixed option sets with inheritance !! Prerequisites TiddlyWiki running in Node.js server mode !! Quick start # Define a type tiddler with `rrt.type: type`, `key: mytype`, and a `rrt.fields:0()` function # Define field tiddlers with `rrt.type: field`, `key: fieldname`, `typed: text` # Use the Spawner to create instances # Field Bar appears automatically on typed tiddlers in view mode <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="warning"> <$fill $name="body">Do not replace `rrfunc` with native `function[]`. The native operator leaks tiddler titles when the function is undefined — `rrfunc` checks `isFunctionDefinition` and returns empty. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/reference","created":"20260305110750641","modified":"20260305110750641","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Type tiddler fields |!Field |!Required |!Description | |`rrt.type` |Yes |Must be `type` | |`key` |Yes |Unique type identifier | |`caption` |No |Display name | |`icon` |No |Emoji or icon reference | |`parent` |No |Parent type key (for inheritance) | |`upref` |No |Prefix for generated titles (e.g., `p` for project) | Body defines `rrt.fields:0()` (base) or `rrt.fields:1()` (subtype) — space-separated field keys. !! Field tiddler fields |!Field |!Required |!Description | |`rrt.type` |Yes |Must be `field` | |`key` |Yes |Field identifier (matches tiddler field name) | |`caption` |No |Display name | |`icon` |No |Emoji or icon | |`typed` |Yes |Editor type (see table below) | |`constraints` |No |Validation rules (see table below) | |`validity` |No |Restrict definition to specific type key | !! Enum tiddler fields |!Field |!Required |!Description | |`rrt.type` |Yes |Must be `enum` | |`key` |Yes |Enum identifier | |`parent` |No |Parent enum key | |`caption` |No |Display name | Body defines `rrt.options:0()` (base) or `rrt.options:1()` (child) — space-separated option values. !! `typed` values |!Value |!Editor |!Description | |`text` |Text input |Free-form text | |`date` |Date picker |Date value | |`enum:` |Pills (single/multi) |Enum selection | |`` |Object reference pills |Reference to typed tiddlers | |`$title` |Computed |Auto-generated title | |`$calculated` |Computed |Auto-calculated field | !! Constraint syntax |!Syntax |!Type |!Meaning | |`n:1` |Selection |Single select (not multi) | |`!N+` |Blocking |Minimum N values required | |`N+` |Warning |Minimum N values recommended | |`!u` |Blocking |Unique wiki-wide | |`u` |Warning |Unique wiki-wide (soft) | |`filter` |Computation |Title generation formula (with `$title`) | !! rrfunc filter operator Usage: `[rrfunc[functionName]]` or `[rrfunc[functionName],[arg]]` Safely calls a TW function by name. Returns `[]` if the function is undefined (unlike native `function[]` which leaks titles). !! Key functions (functions.tid) |!Function |!Purpose | |`rrt.fields()` |Aggregates `:0` + `:1` + `:2` field lists | |`rrt.options()` |Aggregates `:0` + `:1` + `:2` enum options | |`_locate_rrt(key, type)` |Finds most-specific field/enum definition (respects `validity`) | !! State tiddlers |!Pattern |!Purpose | |`$:/state/rimir/typed/spawner/*` |Spawner UI state | |`$:/state/rimir/typed/field-editor/*` |Field editor popup state | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260305110750641","modified":"20260305110750641","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! rrfunc operator Safely calls TW functions by name. Checks `isFunctionDefinition` before calling, returns empty array `[]` if undefined. Critical for inheritance where `rrt.fields:1`/`:2` may not exist on base types. <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="danger"> <$fill $name="body">Native `function[]` leaks tiddler titles when the function is undefined. Always use `rrfunc` in the type system. !! $importvariables Pulls functions/procedures from filter-matched tiddlers into scope. Used for: * Shared functions import (from `functions.tid`) * Dynamic type + parent import (for `rrt.fields`/`rrt.options` aggregators) * Deprecated by TW but no `\import` alternative for computed filters !! Discovery via custom fields The `rrt.type` field serves as a registration mechanism. `[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[type]]` discovers types without a central registry. Works across shadows (plugin tiddlers) and regular tiddlers. !! Function definitions in bodies `\function` at tiddler body start defines a callable function. `$importvariables` brings it into scope. `code-body: yes` field tells TW to treat the entire body as definitions. !! TW issue #9647 Prevents dynamic iteration over function names (e.g., calling `rrt.fields:N` for variable N). This is why the numbered slot pattern (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`) is hardcoded to 3 levels. !! Field value analysis `_other-field-entries` function checks all tiddlers wiki-wide for uniqueness constraints, not just same-type instances. <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body">`$importvariables` is deprecated but remains the only way to import functions from a computed filter expression (where the tiddler title is determined at runtime). "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/documentation","created":"20260305110750642","modified":"20260305110750642","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %> <$tiddler tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/overview"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/overview"/> <%else%> To display this documentation, the plugin [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]] needs to be installed. title: $:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrfunc.js type: application/javascript module-type: filteroperator Filter operator returning those input titles that are returned from a function \*/ "use strict"; /* Export our filter function */ exports.rrfunc = function(source,operator,options) { var functionName = operator.operands[0], params = [], results; $tw.utils.each(operator.operands.slice(1),function(param) { params.push({value: param}); }); // console.log(`Calling ${functionName} with params ${JSON.stringify(params)}`); var variableInfo = options.widget && options.widget.getVariableInfo && options.widget.getVariableInfo(functionName,{params: params, source: source}); if(variableInfo && variableInfo.srcVariable && variableInfo.srcVariable.isFunctionDefinition) { results = variableInfo.resultList ? variableInfo.resultList : [variableInfo.text]; } // console.log(`function ${functionName} with params ${JSON.stringify(params)} results: ${JSON.stringify(results)}`); return results || []; }; ","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"filteroperator","created":"20260210073745285","modified":"20260305110750643"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/readme","created":"20260305110750644","modified":"20260305110750644","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! typed Type system engine for TiddlyWiki. Define schemas via tiddler fields, validate instances, and create new typed tiddlers through a spawner UI. !! Key features * ''Type definitions'' — define schemas with `rrt.type` and `rrt.fields` on tiddler fields * ''Field definitions'' — validation rules, typed editors, calculated fields * ''Validator'' — UI to check all instances against their type schemas (see Validator tab) * ''Spawner'' — UI to create new typed tiddler instances (see Spawner tab) * ''Field editor'' — type-aware input controls for editing typed fields * ''Inheritance'' — parent types for shared field definitions * ''Custom filters'' — `rrfunc` filter functions for type system queries !! Prerequisites No external prerequisites. !! Quick start Define a type tiddler with `rrt.type` and field definitions. Use the Spawner tab to create instances. Use the Validator tab to check for schema violations across all typed tiddlers. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/settings","created":"20260305110750644","modified":"20260305110750644","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"
No configurable settings. Future settings will appear here.
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/styles":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/styles","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".rrt-validation-error { color: <>; font-size: 0.85em; } .rrt-validation-warning { color: #b8860b; font-size: 0.85em; } "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/test/test-functions":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/test/test-functions","description":"Test typed helper functions for locating type and field tiddlers","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki-multiple","tags":"[[$:/tags/wiki-test-spec]]","text":"title: TypeDef rrt.type: type key: mytype type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki Type definition + title: FieldDef rrt.type: field key: myfield type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki constraints: !3+ n:1 Field definition + title: EnumDef rrt.type: enum key: myenum type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki Enum definition + title: Output \whitespace trim \function _locate_rrt(type) [all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type] \function _locate-type-tiddler(type-key) [function[_locate_rrt],[type]key] \function _locate-field-tiddler(field-key, type-key) [function[_locate_rrt],[field]key]:filter[get[validity]enlist-input[]match]~[function[_locate_rrt],[field]key!has[validity]] \function _locate-enum-tiddler(enum-key, type-key) [function[_locate_rrt],[enum]key] \function _calculate_selection(field-tid) [get[constraints]enlist-input[]match[n:1]then[single]]~[[multi]] \function _get-blocking-min(field-key, type-key) [function[_locate-field-tiddler],,get[constraints]enlist-input[]prefix[!]suffix[+]first[]]:map[removeprefix[!]removesuffix[+]] type:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate-type-tiddler],[mytype]] }}}/>,field:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate-field-tiddler],[myfield],[mytype]] }}}/>,enum:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate-enum-tiddler],[myenum],[mytype]] }}}/>,sel:<$text text={{{ [function[_calculate_selection],[FieldDef]] }}}/>,bmin:<$text text={{{ [function[_get-blocking-min],[myfield],[mytype]] }}}/> + title: ExpectedResult

type:TypeDef,field:FieldDef,enum:EnumDef,sel:single,bmin:3

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/test/test-rrfunc.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/test/test-rrfunc.js","text":"/*\ title: $:/plugins/rimir/typed/test/test-rrfunc.js type: application/javascript tags: [[$:/tags/test-spec]] Tests for typed rrfunc filter operator. \*/ "use strict"; describe("typed: rrfunc filter operator", function() { var rrfuncModule; beforeEach(function() { rrfuncModule = require("$:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrfunc.js"); }); it("should export the rrfunc function", function() { expect(rrfuncModule.rrfunc).toBeDefined(); expect(typeof rrfuncModule.rrfunc).toBe("function"); }); it("should return empty array when widget is null", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["someFunc"]}; var options = {widget: null}; var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(result).toEqual([]); }); it("should return empty array when widget is undefined", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["someFunc"]}; var options = {}; var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(result).toEqual([]); }); it("should return empty array when widget has no getVariableInfo", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["someFunc"]}; var options = {widget: {getVariable: function() { return undefined; }}}; var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(result).toEqual([]); }); it("should return empty array when getVariableInfo returns no srcVariable", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]}; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { return {text: "hello"}; } } }; var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(result).toEqual([]); }); it("should return empty array when srcVariable is not a function definition", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]}; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { return { text: "hello", srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: false} }; } } }; var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(result).toEqual([]); }); it("should return resultList when function definition provides it", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]}; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { return { text: "first", resultList: ["alpha", "beta", "gamma"], srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true} }; } } }; var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(result).toEqual(["alpha", "beta", "gamma"]); }); it("should return [text] when no resultList is present", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]}; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { return { text: "single-result", srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true} }; } } }; var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(result).toEqual(["single-result"]); }); it("should pass operands as params to getVariableInfo", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["myFunc", "arg1", "arg2"]}; var capturedParams; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { capturedParams = opts.params; return { text: "result", srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true} }; } } }; rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(capturedParams).toEqual([{value: "arg1"}, {value: "arg2"}]); }); it("should pass the correct function name to getVariableInfo", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); }; var operator = {operands: ["MySpecialFunc"]}; var capturedName; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { capturedName = name; return { text: "ok", srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true} }; } } }; rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(capturedName).toBe("MySpecialFunc"); }); it("should pass source function to getVariableInfo options", function() { var mySource = function(callback) { callback({title: "t"}, "t"); }; var operator = {operands: ["fn"]}; var capturedSource; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { capturedSource = opts.source; return { text: "ok", srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true} }; } } }; rrfuncModule.rrfunc(mySource, operator, options); expect(capturedSource).toBe(mySource); }); it("should return empty params array when only function name is given", function() { var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "t"}, "t"); }; var operator = {operands: ["fn"]}; var capturedParams; var options = { widget: { getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) { capturedParams = opts.params; return { text: "ok", srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true} }; } } }; rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options); expect(capturedParams).toEqual([]); }); }); ","type":"application/javascript","tags":"[[$:/tags/test-spec]]"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/typed/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/typed/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info","text":"{ "description": "Test edition for typed", "plugins": [ "tiddlywiki/jasmine", "rimir/typed" ], "themes": [ "tiddlywiki/vanilla", "tiddlywiki/snowwhite" ] } ","type":".info"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-fields":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-fields","created":"20260305110750644","list-after":"$:/core/ui/ViewTemplate/title","modified":"20260305110750644","tags":"$:/tags/ViewTemplate","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\function _fieldbar-shorten(val) [splitregexp[]firstjoin[]addsuffix[...]] \function _fieldbar-display(val) [length[]compare:integer:gt] :map[function[_fieldbar-shorten],] ~[] <%if [has[rrt.type]]%> <$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/typed/functions]]"> <$let type-field="rrt.type" type-key={{{[get[rrt.type]]}}} target-tid=<> fieldbar-max-length="15" > <$let type-tid={{{[function[_locate-type-tiddler],]}}}> <$importvariables filter="[][get[parent]]:map[function[_locate-type-tiddler],]">
<$list filter="[enlist]" variable="field-key"> <$let field-tid={{{[function[_locate-field-tiddler],,]}}} popup-state={{{[addsuffix[/rrt-fieldbar/]addsuffix]}}} > <%if [get[typed]!match[$title]!match[$calculated]]%> <$button popup=<> class="tc-btn-invisible rrt-field-cell-btn" tooltip={{{[get[caption]]}}}> <$text text={{{[get[icon]]}}}/> <$text text={{{[get]:map[function[_fieldbar-display],]}}}/> <$reveal state=<> type="popup" position="belowleft" animate="yes" class="tc-popup-keep">
<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/typed/field-editor"/>
<%endif%>
<%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-styles":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-styles","created":"20260305110750644","modified":"20260305110750644","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".rrt-field-bar { float: right; display: flex; gap: 4px; font-size: 0.85em; margin: 0 0 4px 8px; } .rrt-field-cell-btn { border: 1px solid <>; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 6px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; background: transparent; } .rrt-field-cell-btn:hover { background: <>; color: <>; } .rrt-field-popup { padding: 8px; min-width: 200px; } "}}}
